steps.title: Find each cost per gram
steps.content:
Divide cost by grams of protein for each food:
$$\text{egg}=\frac{0.36}{6}=0.06$$
$$\text{milk}=\frac{0.24}{8}=0.03$$

steps.title: Compare the two costs
steps.content:
The ratio of egg cost per gram to milk cost per gram is
$$0.06:0.03=2:1$$
The answer is D.
